problem id: 7c980689
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01000001 -> 01100000
  01011110 -> 10101111
  11101110 -> 11110111
  00000101 -> 01000010
  01100011 -> 11110001
  01110111 -> 11111011
  10010010 -> 11001001
  01001100 -> 00100110

query: 00000111
predicted answer: 11000011
